commit.message:
Refactor Mapiah image transform cloning

Add a polymorphic copyWithImageTransform() API on MPImageInsertConfig
and use it from image scale/rotate commands plus image-operation
preview builders. This removes duplicated subtype switches from the
Mapiah-only transform paths while keeping copyWithImageInsertConfigBase()
as the smaller cross-family runtime clone API.

Also simplify move/scale preview handling to treat all
MPImageInsertConfig subclasses through the shared transform-copy
method.

Signed-off-by: Rodrigo Severo <rsev@pm.me>
Co-Authored-By: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
fix(payout): stabilize account verification and broaden bank-code validation (#1125)

* fix: remove route segment config incompatible with cacheComponents

The dynamic/fetchCache/revalidate exports break Turbopack build when
cacheComponents is enabled. These routes already call noStore() inside
the handler, which achieves the same no-cache behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Wire VTU checkout through app payments

* fix(payout): stabilize account verification and broaden bank-code validation

Root causes fixed:
- Infinite re-verification loop: resolveAccount (full mutation object) was an
  unstable useEffect dependency, causing a new request on every render.
  Replaced with useQuery keyed by debounced (accountNumber, bankCode) pair.
- Stale verified name: raw input changes now immediately clear accountName
  via isPendingInput guard, preventing a stale name from authorising a save.
- Save guard bug: &&-logic let saves proceed while verification was pending;
  corrected to !accountName || isVerifying.
- Bank code regex: /^\d{3}$/ rejected real Paystack codes (035A, MFB50992,
  50211, 09). Replaced with bounded alphanumeric schema (min 2, max 16).

Changes:
- New usePayoutAccountVerification hook (useQuery + debounce + isolation)
- New usePaystackBanks hook (backend /api/paystack/banks, deduped by code)
- New shared paystackBankCodeSchema wired into resolve and subaccount schemas
- Rewired payout-settings.tsx to use both new hooks; removed inline effect
- Regression tests for screen, both hooks, schema, helper, and route layers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(payments): address critical VTU checkout review findings

- Webhook: log failed VTU fulfillment instead of silently returning 200
- charge-saved-card: check transaction insert error before charging card
- confirm: use atomic claim pattern (select+maybeSingle) to prevent
  double-fulfillment on concurrent confirm requests
- use-vtu-history: include userId in React Query cache key to prevent
  cross-user data leakage on logout/login

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update confirm route test for atomic claim pattern

---------

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement background image rotation mode

Add a dedicated image-rotation workflow with curved corner handles,
a pivot marker, and undoable rotation/pivot drag commands. Clicking
the active image now toggles between move/scale and rotate modes,
legacy XTherion image inserts are converted on first rotate entry,
and XVI images with xviRoot show a disabled non-draggable pivot.

Also add state-machine coverage for mode toggling, rotation,
pivot dragging, and fixed-pivot XVI behavior, and document the new
rotation workflow in the changelog.

Signed-off-by: Rodrigo Severo <rsev@pm.me>
Co-Authored-By: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
perf: migrate to 'use cache: remote' + cache homepage products (#1126)

* perf: migrate to 'use cache: remote' + cache homepage products

Upgrade all 21 'use cache' directives to 'use cache: remote' so
cached data persists in Vercel Runtime Cache across serverless
instances instead of being ephemeral per-instance.

Changes:
- Upgrade 21× 'use cache' → 'use cache: remote' across cached-data.ts,
  cached-categories.ts, cached-storefront-product-index.ts, feed-data.ts
- Add getCachedStorefrontHomeProducts() to cache homepage products
  query (was raw uncached Supabase query on every page load)
- Remove cookies()/createClient() from storefront-content.tsx
- Remove connection() from product detail page (was forcing dynamic
  rendering unnecessarily)
- Add getMerchantStrict() for cache-safe merchant lookups that throw
  on transient failure instead of returning null
- Harden getCachedFeatureSettings() to throw on query error, switch
  to maybeSingle(), update non-cache callers with try/catch
- Fix 4 cache invalidation gaps: product-index, legacy-redirect,
  merchant-feed, navigation-categories tags
- Normalize blog cache tags to lowercase (identifier + postSlug)
- Bump hono to 4.12.12 and @hono/node-server to 1.19.13 in
  pnpm.overrides (fixes 6 medium security alerts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: update lockfile for hono overrides

---------

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refine image overlay outside-click dismissal

Keep the available-images overlay open during image edit interactions
when the user clicks on the active image or its scale handles, but
close it when the user clicks elsewhere on the canvas.

Only clear the image edit state on that outside-canvas dismissal path,
so closing the overlay through its own buttons does not force a state
reset.

Update CHANGELOG.md for the new image-overlay dismissal behavior.

commit.message:
Add reset action for background image transforms

Add a reset button to the available-images list so background images
can quickly return to their default transform and visibility state.
The reset restores translation, scale, rotation, image visibility, and
XVI grid visibility, preserves the XVI root, and recreates the result
as a THXTherionImageInsertConfig.

Move the reset workflow out of MPAvailableImagesWidget and into
TH2FileEditMoveScaleRotateElementController so image-transform business
logic stays centralized with the other move/scale/rotate actions.

Update EN/PT help pages, localizations, generated l10n files, and the
changelog to describe the new reset behavior.

Signed-off-by: Rodrigo Severo <rsev@pm.me>
Co-Authored-By: GPT-5 Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
feat(web): refresh onboarding setup flow

Summary:
- add richer onboarding step metadata, preset-driven agent bootstrap,
  and seeded first-ticket suggestions for different setup goals
- tighten onboarding UX with skip confirmation, streamlined provider
  cards, and clearer empty-state copy across key project screens
- apply small frontend fixes required by local validation, including
  org-admin settings state usage and repo-wide Prettier adjustments

Rationale:
- new projects need clearer guidance on why each onboarding step
  matters and faster ways to choose a bootstrap path
- stronger empty states and confirmation flows reduce setup mistakes
  and make the app easier to understand before any data exists
- keeping the frontend tree lint- and format-clean avoids blocking
  follow-up web CI checks on unrelated files

Tests:
- PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/bin:$PATH make frontend-api-audit-check
- PATH=$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v24.13.0/bin:$PATH make web-install
- custom web CI command with temporary Playwright config on port 4273
  (fails in tests/e2e/iam-settings-migration.spec.ts because
  "Migration note" was not found)

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

fix(machinetransport): stabilize preflight failure parsing

Summary:
- emit runtime preflight classification markers on a single stream
- keep the human-readable failure message on stderr for operators
- avoid fast-exit websocket preflight races that could downgrade
  classified openase failures to transport failures

Rationale:
- the websocket command-session CombinedOutput helper does not preserve
  cross-stream line atomicity
- duplicating the OPENASE_RUNTIME_PREFLIGHT_FAILURE marker on stdout and
  stderr let the two copies interleave and break parser classification
- this was surfacing as a flaky Backend Checks failure on the ASE-102 PR

Tests:
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$PATH" go test ./internal/infra/machinetransport -run TestRunRemoteRuntimePreflightReportsOpenASEFailureForFastExits -count=100
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$PATH" go test ./internal/infra/machinetransport -run 'TestRunRemoteRuntimePreflightReportsOpenASEFailure|TestRunRemoteRuntimePreflightReportsOpenASEFailureForFastExits|TestRunRemoteRuntimePreflightOverWebsocketListener' -count=1
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$PATH" go test ./internal/orchestrator -run TestRuntimeLauncherRunTickPreparesRemoteWorkspaceDirectlyFromRepositoryURL -count=1
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" OPENASE_PGTEST_SHARED_ROOT="$HOME/.cache/openase/pgtest" OPENASE_GO_TEST_PROGRESS_MODE=json make check
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" OPENASE_PGTEST_SHARED_ROOT="$HOME/.cache/openase/pgtest" OPENASE_GO_TEST_PROGRESS_MODE=json .codex/skills/push/scripts/openase_ci_gate.sh

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
fix(repo): support file project repo URLs

Summary:
- make project repo parsing explicitly accept file:// URLs and reject
  empty file URL paths
- add file:// regression coverage for catalog APIs, workspace prepare,
  agent platform repo routes, and runtime launcher remote prepares
- document that OpenASE supports hosted providers and machine-local or
  self-hosted Git sources, with file:// resolved on the prepare machine

Rationale:
- file:// support already worked in practice, but it was not encoded as
  an intentional contract and had no clear regression signal
- explicit parser handling plus end-to-end tests protect future repo URL
  tightening from silently breaking local or self-hosted Git flows
- user-facing docs now clarify that GitHub and GitLab are optional and
  that local reachability depends on the machine performing clone/fetch

Tests:
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$PATH" go test ./internal/domain/catalog -run TestCatalogEntityParsersAndHelpers -count=1
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$PATH" go test ./internal/infra/workspace -run 'TestManagerPrepareClonesFileRepositoryURL|TestWorkspaceLayoutAndParserHelpers' -count=1
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$PATH" go test ./internal/httpapi -run 'TestCatalogCRUDRoutes|TestAgentPlatformPrivilegedRoutesRequireExplicitScopes|TestAgentPlatformExpandedProjectRoutesRequireExplicitScopes' -count=1
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$PATH" go test ./internal/orchestrator -run TestRuntimeLauncherRunTickPreparesRemoteWorkspaceDirectlyFromRepositoryURL -count=1
- PATH="$PWD/.tooling/go/bin:$HOME/.local/go1.26.1/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" OPENASE_PGTEST_SHARED_ROOT="$HOME/.cache/openase/pgtest" OPENASE_GO_TEST_PROGRESS_MODE=json make openapi-check check build lint lint-depguard lint-architecture

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
feat(operator): add workflow supervision lane

Summary:
- add a dedicated workflow-supervision lane to the cockpit operator terminal with
  history, branch-debug, and recovery summaries plus direct run controls
- split the heavy tools API backend shard into semantic buckets and pin the new
  shard contract in regression tests
- update implementation docs to record the shipped operator-control and CI
  stabilization surface

Rationale:
- long-running workflow supervision was still too thin in the operator terminal,
  forcing operators back into other panes for recent-run context and recovery
- the failing backend CI seam was the monolithic tools API shard, so the batch
  needed to land the real shard split instead of only changing frontend UI

Tests:
- python3 -m py_compile backend/scripts/run_backend_test_shard.py backend/tests/test_run_backend_test_shard.py
- cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_run_backend_test_shard.py -q
- cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-require-module npx vitest run src/components/cockpit/CockpitView.test.tsx -t "surfaces active triage for approvals, workflows, queued guardian items, and reach failures"
- cd frontend && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-require-module npx vitest run src/components/cockpit/CockpitView.test.tsx
- cd frontend && npm run build
- cd docs && npm run build
- git diff --check

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>

Reuse cached seeds in constructs

Object and tuple phase-two seed extraction now reuse the
pre-completed child completion result for the current field or
element instead of recomputing it. This keeps non-idempotent source
completion defaults aligned with the value that phase two exposes,
and the regression coverage now locks that down in both sync and
async modes.

Reviewed comments:

- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/780#discussion_r3051105110
- https://github.com/dahlia/optique/pull/780#discussion_r3051105115

commit.message:
feat(macos): Add ClawdCursorHost app and CLI→host IPC (#47)

### Summary
- Added native macOS host app (ClawdCursorHost) that owns TCC permissions
- CLI now delegates desktop operations to host via localhost HTTP IPC (port 3848)
- Added new helper methods: moveMouse, dragMouse, captureScreen
- Security: Host IPC binds to 127.0.0.1 only

### Architecture
ClawdCursorHost runs as menu bar app (🐾), exposes:
- GET /health - liveness check
- GET /status - permission status
- POST /rpc - JSON-RPC proxy to clawdcursor-helper

Token-based auth via ~/.clawdcursor/host-token (mode 0600).

### Testing
- All 172 tests pass
- TypeScript compiles clean
- Platform guards verified: macOS code only runs on darwin
- No impact on Windows/Linux paths

commit.message:
进一步批量将可迁移 grammar 迁移到 crate-backed parser (#15)

## Why

这轮继续把仓库里“没有本地 grammar / scanner 魔改、crate API 与当前 `tree-sitter`
主版本兼容、且没有额外许可证问题”的 grammar 收口到 crate-backed parser。

目标是让 `build.rs` 只处理真正值得继续 vendored 的 grammar，把 parser 来源策略进一步统一下来。

## What

- 保留 TOML 的 crate-backed 迁移，并移除了不再需要的 Node / `pnpm` 构建依赖
- 已迁到 crate-backed 的 grammar 包括：
  - `toml`
  - `json`
  - `bash`
  - `powershell`
  - `batch`
  - `yaml`
  - `rust`
  - `python`
  - `go`
  - `jsdoc`
  - `php`
  - `scala`
  - `swift`
  - `dart`
  - `elixir`
  - `zig`
  - `html`
  - `css`
  - `javascript`
  - `regex`
- 对应更新 `grammars/registry.toml` 和 `src/language_runtime.rs`，统一改用各 Rust
crate 导出的 parser
- 删除这批语言不再需要的 vendored parser / scanner / support 源文件
- 新增 `docs/vendor-grammar-exceptions.md`，单独追踪为什么剩余 grammar 还要保留 vendored
模式
- 新增一条单测，自动检查 `docs/vendor-grammar-exceptions.md` 和
`grammars/registry.toml` 是否保持一致
- 更新 `THIRD_PARTY.md`、`docs/architecture.md` 和 `README.md`，把当前 parser
来源策略和剩余例外收口到文档里

## Remaining Vendored

当前仍保留 vendored 模式的 grammar，统一按下面几类管理：
- crates.io 上没有可用 grammar crate
- 上游 crate 仍依赖旧版 `tree-sitter`，暂时无法和当前 0.26 系列共存
- 仓库内已有本地 grammar / scanner 改造
- 仍被其他 vendored grammar 在构建期直接依赖
- 许可证原因不适合切回上游 crate

具体名单和原因见 `docs/vendor-grammar-exceptions.md`。

## Testing

- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo test vendored_grammar_exceptions_doc_matches_registry --
--nocapture`
- `cargo test --bin kat -- --nocapture`
- `KAT_AGENT_TEST_LOG_MODE=quiet just test`

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

commit.message:
Keep parse exceptions visible

Phase-two seed extraction should only recover from ordinary completion
failures. If the first-pass parse throws, the runner must preserve that
exception instead of silently retrying through the seed path.

This also adds regression coverage for the top-level async parse case and
makes the existing sync top-level parse regression exercise the seed hook
reliably.

commit.message:
新增更多语言支持并优化动态路径补全 (#14)

## Why

这轮继续补齐 `kat` 和 `bat` 的覆盖缺口，同时把新增源码语言的 grammar 集成方式收敛回仓库当前主路线：默认
vendored，并由 `build.rs` 统一构建。

本次覆盖两类高频内容：
- 主流源码语言：`PHP`、`Scala`、`Swift`、`Dart`、`Elixir`、`Zig`
- 终端高频特殊文件：`SSH Config`、`Git Attributes`、`Git Commit`、`Git Rebase
Todo`、`Requirements.txt`、`Apache Conf`、`SCSS`、`Sass`

同时顺手收敛了一处动态补全体验问题：路径补全现在不再只支持 basename 前缀匹配，而是支持大小写不敏感的“前缀优先、子串兜底”匹配，更接近
fish 原生路径补全的体感。

## What

- 新增 runtime / detector：
  - `php`、`scala`、`swift`、`dart`、`elixir`、`zig`
  - `ssh_config`、`gitattributes`、`git_commit`、`git_rebase`
  - `requirements`、`apache`、`scss`、`sass`
- 补齐对应 alias、runtime 注册、fixture、`docs/language-coverage.md` 和
`THIRD_PARTY.md`
- `SCSS` 复用仓库现有 vendored CSS grammar，不额外引入新的 `tree-sitter-css` 依赖
- `SSH Config`、`Git Attributes`、`Apache Conf` 等补上特殊路径 / 文件名识别，而不只依赖扩展名
- 对 `git-rebase-todo`、`requirements.txt`、`Apache Conf` 补了仓库内最小 grammar 与
query，避免只做 detector 占位
- 将 `PHP`、`Scala`、`Swift`、`Dart`、`Elixir`、`Zig` 从 crate-backed parser 迁回
vendored grammar，移除对应 Cargo grammar 依赖，并按仓库现有约定收口 scanner / support 文件布局
- 调整动态路径补全匹配策略：
  - 保留大小写不敏感前缀匹配
  - 在没有前缀命中的条目上增加大小写不敏感子串匹配
  - 维持前缀命中优先于子串命中的排序
  - 保持 `.` 前缀下隐藏文件优先，不让子串补全干扰该行为

## Testing

- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo test --bin kat path_completion_ -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test --bin kat -- --nocapture`
- `KAT_AGENT_TEST_LOG_MODE=quiet just test`

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: kat
repository.description: A syntax-highlighting cat built around Tree-sitter.

commit.message:
Preserve first-pass exceptions

Keep phase-two seed recovery limited to normal completion failures.
First-pass exceptions should still abort the run, so unexpected
completion errors are no longer masked by dynamic context recovery.
This also adds regression coverage around thrown parse/complete paths
and removes redundant object() seed-recovery branching.

Refs https://github.com/dahlia/optique/issues/180

Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: optique
repository.description: Type-safe combinatorial CLI parser for TypeScript

commit.message:
Keep phase two alive after seedable failures

Recover runWith() and runWithSync() when the first pass reaches a
usable intermediate state but fails during completion.  The runner now
extracts a best-effort phase-two seed from parser state, allowing
dynamic contexts like bindConfig(fail(), ...) to resolve config-only
required values before the final parse.

This adds regression coverage for the async and sync facade paths,
run()-level delegation, and core seed recovery behavior.  It also
documents the best-effort phase-two contract and records the user-
visible behavior change in CHANGES.md.

Fixes https://github.com/dahlia/optique/issues/180

Co-Authored-By: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.name: optique
repository.description: Type-safe combinatorial CLI parser for TypeScript

commit.message:
fix(import): add IMPORT_JOB_WORKER_SECRET to turbo.json env passthrough (#1119)

Turborepo strict mode on Vercel filters out env vars not listed in
turbo.json. IMPORT_JOB_WORKER_SECRET was missing, so triggerImportWorker()
silently returned without triggering the worker endpoint in production.
This caused large import jobs to orphan when the inline processImportJobById
exceeded the Vercel function timeout.

Also adds IMPORT_JOB_WORKER_BATCH_SIZE and IMPORT_JOB_DIRECT_UPLOAD_ENABLED
for completeness.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Lock in issue 267 regressions

Add focused regression coverage for the -- terminator path that issue
267 reported. The new tests exercise context-backed parsing in both
@optique/core and @optique/run so --help/--version tokens after --
stay positional values and still trigger env-backed fallbacks.

The coverage also locks in custom help/version aliases after -- so the
lenient early-exit scanner cannot drift away from parser semantics in
future refactors.

Close https://github.com/dahlia/optique/issues/267

commit.message:
新增 C# / Groovy / Diff / Properties / JQ / Less / DOT / nginx 运行时支持 (#13)

## Why

这批语言和文件类型是当前 `bat` 对照下最值得继续补齐的一组缺口：

- 通用源码语言：`C#`、`Groovy`
- 终端高频文本类型：`Diff`、`Java Properties`、`nginx`
- 配置 / 样式 / 图描述语言：`JQ`、`Less`、`Graphviz (DOT)`

这次顺手把一些集成方向也一起收敛到了更长期可维护的实现：

- `Less` 不再额外依赖另一套 `tree-sitter-css` 包，而是直接复用仓库里已经 vendored 的 CSS
grammar
- `JQ` 没有引入 GPL 线路的 grammar，而是改为 vendored BSD 3-Clause 上游实现

## What

- 新增 `csharp`、`groovy`、`diff`、`properties`、`jq`、`less`、`dot`、`nginx`
runtime 注册与语言分发
- 补齐对应 alias / detector / fixture / 高亮 query
- 为 `diff.plus`、`diff.minus` 增加主题映射，保证 patch 视图的正负变更可读
- 为 `nginx` 增加常见文件名和路径检测，包括
`nginx.conf`、`mime.types`、`fastcgi_params`、`sites-*/*.conf` 等
- 将 `Less` 切到 vendored grammar，并改为复用现有 `css` grammar
- 将 `JQ` 切到仓库内 vendored BSD grammar，避免 GPL 依赖进入主线
- 同步更新语言覆盖文档与 `THIRD_PARTY.md`

## Testing

- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo test --bin kat -- --nocapture`
- `KAT_AGENT_TEST_LOG_MODE=quiet just test`

---------

fix(deploy): preload agent CLIs in runtime image

Summary:
- switch the Coolify runtime image to node:22-alpine and preload
  codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI alongside git and ripgrep
- pin the bundled CLI package versions and add coreutils so Gemini
  works on Alpine via env -S

  READMEs

Rationale:
- let OpenASE deployments detect and use the common agent CLIs
  without manual in-container bootstrapping
- avoid Alpine runtime failures where BusyBox env breaks the Gemini
  launcher script
- keep the docs aligned with the actual package users need to install

Lock in mapped dependency defaults

Add regression coverage for the issue 239 scenario across shared-buffer
constructs so `object()`, `tuple()`, and `merge()` stay aligned with
top-level parsing when `map(withDefault(option(...), default))` wraps a
dependency source.

fallbacks from dependency-source registration semantics, and document
the user-visible behavior in CHANGES.md.

commit.message:
feat(cli): 用 clap derive 重构参数解析并接入动态补全与版本元信息 (#12)

## Why
- 现有 CLI 参数解析仍是手写逻辑，不适合继续承接版本信息和动态补全。
- 需要一个稳定的 `--version` 输出，用来查看当前构建对应的 branch、commit、构建时间、目标平台和仓库状态。
- 需要接入 `clap` 的动态补全能力，并把常见交互打磨到日常可用，而不是只停在“能补全”。

## What
- 用 `clap` derive 重构 `kat` 的参数解析，保留现有 `--debug-*`、`--language` 和
`--paging` 行为。
- 接入 `shadow-rs`，实现 `--version` / `-V` 的构建元信息输出。
- 接入动态补全，并补齐一轮交互修正：
  - `kat <tab>` 默认只补路径，避免 `--help` / `--version` 干扰。
  - `kat -<tab>` 才补参数。
  - `--debug-*` 默认不出现在补全里，但仍保留在 `--help`。
  - 路径补全支持文件和目录；点前缀输入优先补隐藏项；修复 `.` / `..` 相关 panic。
- 将运行时错误展示切到 `miette`，文件读取失败等场景不再依赖手工拼接文案。

## Testing
- `cargo run -- --version`
- `cargo run -- --help`
- `cargo run -- con`
- `COMPLETE=fish cargo run -- -- kat ''`
- `COMPLETE=fish cargo run -- -- kat -`
- `cargo test --bin kat -- --nocapture`
- `KAT_AGENT_TEST_LOG_MODE=quiet just test`

---------

Co-authored-by: OpenAI Codex <codex@openai.com>

repository.description: A syntax-highlighting cat built around Tree-sitter.

commit.message:
fix: reset last_config_poll_at on push-triggered config pull to prevent double-pull (#133)

When config_update_available signal arrives from heartbeat, the pull is
triggered immediately but last_config_poll_at was not updated. This left
the periodic poll timer stale, so the next heartbeat tick could find the
interval already elapsed and fire an extra unnecessary pull (double-pull
every update cycle in the worst case).

Fix: update last_config_poll_at = ngx.now() in the push-triggered branch,
mirroring what the periodic branch already does.

Adds a regression test: after a push-triggered pull with 25s elapsed out
of a 30s interval, the immediately following heartbeat (35s elapsed) must
not trigger a second pull.

Fixes #132.

Co-authored-by: Codex <codex@openai.com>
